entries.evidence: User request to bootstrap the quant-validation-agent harness with directory structure, policies, tools, middleware, tests, and docs.
entries.root_cause: No quantitative validation harness existed in the repository.
entries.targeted_fix: Create CLAUDE.md, README, harness policy files (system_prompt, data_contract, metric_policy, validation_workflow, threshold_policy, permission_policy, change_manifest schema/file), docs, skills, subagents, tools, middleware, tests, examples, memory and report folders.
entries.expected_benefit: Standardized, reproducible, observable quantitative validation for scoring / PD / LGD / EAD / scenario regression models.
entries.expected_regression_risk: Low — additive scaffolding under a new top-level directory; no operational system is touched.
entries.validation_method: pytest run on tools and middleware unit tests; manual review of policy and docs files.
entries.rollback_rule: Delete the quant-validation-agent directory if scaffolding is rejected; downgrade unsuccessful changes by file-level reverts and append a rollback entry.
